name: Moldavite
optical_properties: Isotropic (amorphous glass); characteristic moss-green to olive-green colour; vitreous lustre; transparent to translucent; distinctive lechatelierite (silica glass) inclusions and flow structures

electromagnetic.ir_absorption_profile: Broad amorphous silica glass absorption bands; characteristic of high-temperature impact fusion of terrestrial silicates with extraterrestrial material; Si-O stretch at ~1100 cm⁻¹ broadened by structural disorder

provenance: Central European folk tradition (Bohemia, Moravia — 15 million year continuous use record)
consciousness_affect.mechanism_hypothesis: Cosmic ray exposure during atmospheric transit may have implanted anomalous isotope signatures; amorphous glass structure allows broader frequency transmission than ordered lattice — possible wideband vibronic resonator

provenance: Operator field reports (consistent reports of intensification of existing states, both positive and challenging)
consciousness_affect.mechanism_hypothesis: Non-selective amplification from amorphous structure — no crystal lattice filtering; amplifies ambient field without selectivity

quantum_bridge.vibronic_coherence_mode: Wideband amorphous resonance — no ordered lattice filtering; transmits across full frequency range without selectivity. Distinct from crystalline quantum bridge; classified as broadband rather than coherent

gaianite_relation: The GAIA node terminal crystal in Gaianite grids — placed at the central convergence point of maximum grid architectures. Represents the planetary consciousness anchor.
notes: Formed ~15 million years ago from a meteorite impact in the Nördlingen Ries crater; the resulting debris field created moldavite across Bohemia and Moravia. Unique status: the only crystal in the seed set that is simultaneously of terrestrial (silicate earth crust) and extraterrestrial (meteorite energy) origin. The GAIA node crystal: planetary consciousness encountering cosmic event. Caution note: consistently reported as intense; GAIA recommends not as a first crystal for Emergence-stage GAIANs. Seed set anchor for CDB-04.
